duration_policy: CLI-supported integer duration; seedance2.0_vip image2video supports 4-15s
rhythm_reference_policy: reference only; not an input image because it is a contact sheet
visual_goal: active follow-up attack after shockwave with immediate movement, minimized pullback, visible footwork and forearm contact
action_concept: immediate post-shockwave forearm clash, sidestep deflection, short palm counter
continuity_requirements: no style shift from shockwave material
body_mechanics: movement begins immediately from first frame
Fen Shou presses forward from screen left with rear foot pushing on wet stone
Fen Shou right shoulder lowers and right forearm drives diagonally toward Shuang Ji centerline
Shuang Ji slides left foot half-step backward toward screen right
Shuang Ji rotates hips and torso sideways
Shuang Ji left forearm redirects Fen Shou wrist or forearm outward
forearms briefly cross and press with continuous shoulder elbow wrist hip and foot adjustment
Shuang Ji sends short right palm from chest toward Fen Shou forearm or shoulder armor
Fen Shou absorbs pressure with forearm and shoulder armor while feet slide slightly
small water splashes and shoe-slide traces on wet stone
hair sleeves and rain lines react to fast movement
negative_constraints: no obvious camera pullback while fighters are static
prompt:
使用参考帧作为唯一首帧。保持雨中古寺主殿正面中轴、湿石板庭院、远处主殿、冷灰蓝雨光、焚狩在左、霜玑在右、两名角色近距离交手后的低重心位置关系不变。半写实3D武侠电影质感保持一致。

这是冲击波刚散后的下一段近身连续攻防，不是停顿摆拍。第一帧开始两人就继续移动，不要等待，不要发呆，不要让镜头拉远时人物静止。

镜头保持正面中轴中远景，轻微手持或极轻微推近即可，不要明显回拉，不要切近景，不要突然改变画风。

0.0–0.6秒：焚狩从左侧前压，后脚蹬住湿石板，右肩略低，右前臂沿斜线顶向霜玑中线。霜玑左脚向画面右后方滑半步，身体侧旋，左前臂贴住焚狩手腕或前臂，把来力向外拨开。

0.6–1.6秒：两人的前臂短暂交叉并互相压住，肩膀、肘部、手腕、腰胯和脚步都有连续调整。焚狩继续向前压，但身体被带偏一点；霜玑保持侧身卸力，衣袖和长发被快速动作甩动。湿石板上出现小水花和鞋底滑移痕迹。

1.6–2.6秒：霜玑从胸前送出短促右掌，掌根打向焚狩前臂或肩甲位置，不打脸，不飞身。焚狩用前臂和肩甲承接压力，脚步微微滑退半步但仍保持进攻架势。

2.6–4.0秒：两人没有停成静态海报，而是保持小幅连续步法和护架调整，准备下一次交手。雨幕继续下落，地面环形余波逐渐变弱，人物仍踩在湿石板上，主殿背景清楚可见。

限制：不要新的巨大球形冲击波，不要第二次爆炸，不要圆形水幕，不要护盾罩，不要武器，不要飞起，不要大跳，不要慢动作摆拍，不要冻结拉远，不要现代城市，不要第三人，不要重复角色，不要融合身体，不要多余肢体，不要改变古寺主殿正面中轴，不要文字水印。
allowed_next_action: Human review package first. Submit only after explicit live-step authorization and command-contract preflight.
human_review_feedback: previous timing was too soft and regular
action must begin immediately from the first frame
fighters must not remain static during camera motion
require visible footwork, forearm contact, shoulder and hip adjustment, clothing and hair motion, wet-floor feedback
timing_policy: 0.0-0.6s immediate pressure and sidestep; 0.6-1.6s forearm pressure and redirection; 1.6-2.6s short palm counter; 2.6-4.0s continuous guard and footwork setup
camera_policy: frontal-axis mid-wide view; slight handheld or very slight push-in only; avoid obvious pullback, close-up cut, or style shift
motion_policy: first frame starts moving; continuous grounded fighter motion; no frozen pullback or static poster hold
